acquisition method: analyzed on a Fusion Orbitrap tribrid mass spectrometer (Thermo) in a data-dependent mode.
cleavage agent: digested overnight at 37 °C in 2 M urea/100 mM TEAB, pH 8.5, with trypsin (Promega).
enrichment method: we performed IP of endogenous BRD9 from micrococcal nuclease-treated nuclear lysates.
instrument: analyzed on a Fusion Orbitrap tribrid mass spectrometer (Thermo).
reduction reagent: 1 mM dithiothreitol (DTT), 1 mM phenylmethylsulfonyl fluoride (PMSF), 1 µM pepstatin, 10 µM leupeptin, and 10 µM chymostatin.
